question: The Oberoi family is part of a hotel company that has a head office in what city?

context.title: Oberoi family
context.text: The Oberoi family is associated with The Oberoi Group, a major hotel company.

context.title: The Oberoi Group
context.text: The Oberoi Group is a hotel company whose head office is in Delhi.

question: What nationality was James Henry Miller's wife?

context.title: Ewan MacColl
context.text: Ewan MacColl was born as James Henry Miller and was married to Peggy Seeger.

context.text: Peggy Seeger is an American folk singer.
